project_context.domain: Church Management Web App (Casa Pâinii Ocna Mureș)

theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The reference app uses a highly warm, welcoming, and tactile aesthetic utilizing earthy tones (terracotta, clay, peach, warm beige). This invokes a feeling of community, trust, and spirituality.

headings.description: A modern, geometric yet friendly sans-serif that provides a welcoming, accessible feel for prominent titles.

body.description: Clean, highly readable geometric sans-serif that pairs perfectly with Outfit, adding warmth without sacrificing legibility.

color_palette.description: Background is a warm cream/beige (#FAF9F6). Primary is a terracotta/clay brown (#B65A4A equivalent). Accents include soft peach and warm sand tones. The overall feel is non-clinical, heavily relying on natural earthy warmth.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 on containers. Elements must have breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Extremely rounded. Main cards should be rounded-3xl (1.5rem radius). Buttons pill-shaped (rounded-full). Smaller cards rounded-2xl.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Soft, diffuse ambient shadows to lift cards off the background without harsh lines. Use 'shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]'.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use Bento/Masonry style grids for event categories and useful links. Mix standard squares (col-span-1) with tall portrait cards (row-span-2) to create visual tension.

components_strategy.navbar: Sticky top with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-background/80. Clean top bar with wordmark logo on the left, user/account icon on the right (mobile) and clean nav links on desktop.
components_strategy.hero_carousel: Carousel card with a featured sermon/event over a warm clay-colored editorial poster image. Add a bottom-left aligned title, speaker name, date/time, and pagination dots below the carousel. Use a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) on the image to ensure text readability.
components_strategy.bento_cards: For 'Utile' and 'Înscrieri' sections: Grids of rounded image cards (rounded-3xl). The label must be overlaid at the bottom-left of each card with a soft gradient behind it. Mix tall and wide cards.
components_strategy.sticky_bottom_bar: For mobile views or key CTAs (like 'Descarcă aplicația' or 'Înscrie-te'), use a sticky bottom bar with backdrop-blur, containing a pill-shaped primary button.
components_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons use the terracotta color. Secondary buttons use a soft peach/beige background with terracotta or dark text.
components_strategy.forms_and_auth: Generous padding on inputs, rounded-xl or rounded-2xl inputs. Soft background for the form container.

page_specific_guidelines.home: Implement the hero carousel (clay/warm poster backgrounds). Below it, add sections ('Utile', 'Înscrieri') using the Bento grid layout with overlaid labels.
page_specific_guidelines.events: Searchable, filterable grid of event cards. Cards should feature a warm image, large rounded corners, and clear typography for category, price (RON), date, location, and spots available. Use soft shadows on hover.
page_specific_guidelines.event_detail: Immersive hero image with rounded bottom corners. Content below should be well-spaced. Sidebar for packages should use a distinctive soft-peach card background. Register CTA should be sticky on mobile.
page_specific_guidelines.registration: Package selection via radio cards (selectable cards with border and background shift when active). Clean order summary. Pill-shaped confirm button.
page_specific_guidelines.auth_pages: Login/Signup should have a clean, centered card on a soft warm gradient or solid cream background. Use Google OAuth button with standard styling. Ensure success/verification states are friendly and welcoming.
page_specific_guidelines.dashboard: Greeting header with large warm typography. Stats cards should be visually distinct (maybe varying subtle warm background tints). 'My events' list with clear status badges (pill-shaped). Attendee QR/ID card styled like a premium digital pass.
page_specific_guidelines.watch_live: Video embed with a rounded-3xl container. Prominent 'LIVE' indicator in primary terracotta. Grid of past sermons below, styled similarly to the Bento cards.

hero_and_community.description: Shallow focus photography of hand and people (warm lighting)
Woman raises hand during worship in a church setting

events_and_youth.description: Group of friends playing guitar and singing by a campfire (perfect for youth/group events)

bread_and_communion.description: View of baked bread on jute (ties into the Casa Pâinii / House of Bread motif)

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The project uses Next.js App Router but the files are written in standard JavaScript (.js / .jsx), NOT TypeScript. DO NOT attempt to write or convert files to .tsx. Stick strictly to .js.
CRITICAL: You MUST keep all existing API integrations, Supabase calls, and state management intact. The user's request is purely an aesthetic UI update.
CRITICAL: Keep all functionalities strictly preserved (all 10 points mentioned in the brief: home, events, event detail, registration, login, signup, dashboard, watch live, navbar, footer).
CRITICAL: Apply the Tailwind v4 @theme inline variables to globals.css as defined in color_palette. Replace the existing generic tokens with these warm, organic oklch values.
CRITICAL: Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, etc.) include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
CRITICAL: Implement the fonts using next/font/google (`Outfit` and `DMSans` or standard imports). Update tailwind config or layout.js accordingly.
CRITICAL: Use the provided images for placeholder/demo cards if necessary, matching the specific categories.
